raw_consumer_statement:
Consumer Information Name : XXXX XXXX Address : XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX, XXXX  XXXX Phone : XXXX Email : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX : XXXX XXXX Order # : XXXX Transaction Amount : {$2000.00} Transaction Date : XX/XX/year> Complaint Description : I purchased a XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX  ) from XXXX XXXX for {$2000.00}. The order was shipped via XXXX  ( Tracking # XXXX ). The package was marked as delivered, but the XXXX XXXX was not inside the box, and I did not sign for the item, despite a signature being required for this high-value product. Other items in the shipment were delivered, but the XXXX XXXX was missing. 

I reported the missing item immediately to XXXX XXXX, filed a XXXX  claim, submitted a police report, and filed a XXXX  complaint. Despite providing all documentation, Best Buy denied responsibility. 

I disputed the charge with my credit card issuer XXXX times : First dispute ( online submission ) : Denied on the basis that I did not follow XXXX XXXX  cancellation/return policy. This is factually incorrect, as I never canceled or returned the item ; it was never delivered. 

Second dispute ( formal certified mail ) : Denied on the basis that the merchandise was delivered. This is factually incorrect because the XXXX XXXX was missing from the box and no signature was obtained. 

Third dispute ( dispute of the first denial ) : Denied again with the explanation that the merchandise was delivered. This decision ignores the facts that the XXXX XXXX was missing, the signature requirement was violated, and XXXX XXXX has produced no evidence of delivery. 

These repeated denials are unsupported by evidence and ignore the facts of the case. 

Exhibit References : Exhibit A : XXXX XXXX order confirmation and invoice ( Order # XXXX ) Exhibit B : Credit card statement showing {$2000.00} charge Exhibit C : XXXX  tracking XXXX ( Tracking # XXXX ) Exhibit D : Photos of shipping box and contents received ( XXXX XXXX missing ) Exhibit E : Timeline of XXXX XXXX phone calls and case numbers ( customer records ) : Case # XXXX Case # XXXX Case # XXXX Case # XXXX Case # XXXX Exhibit F : XXXX  claim documentation ( Claim # XXXX ) Exhibit G : Police report ( Report # XXXX ) Requested Resolution : I am requesting a full refund of {$2000.00} to my original form of payment. Alternatively, I would accept a replacement XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX chip ) of the same model and specifications. I also request written confirmation of the resolution. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
